audits/frontend/safety/STEP_19D_PUBLISHING_APPROVE_FAIL_CONFIRMATION_AUDIT.md:16:- `failPublishingItem` has no frontend confirmation gate. Its backend endpoint calls `assertPublishingMutationAllowed` but the `fail` action is **not** in any governance-sensitive action list — no freeze check, no approval check. The backend does not restrict it. It is completely unconstrained at the server layer, creates a permanent `recordPublishingExecutionOutcome` audit record (`manual_publish_failed`), and triggers `logCriticalFailure`.
